## Summary

Describe the user-visible or maintainer-visible result.

## Verification

- [ ] Release build succeeds with warnings treated as errors
- [ ] CTest passes
- [ ] Installer fixture tests pass, when relevant
- [ ] Runtime behavior was smoke-tested, when relevant
- [ ] Offset documentation and build ID were updated, when relevant

## Binding evidence

For game-binding changes, list the old/new values, dump signature or field layout used as evidence, and Redmatch 2 build ID. Do not attach game binaries or a complete dump.
